warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round PVC pipe
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
3 PVC Pass Throughs
3 PVC Around the Worlds each way
10 Worlds Greatest Stretch
10 Band Row Rotate Press
2 rounds (PVC/Barbell):
3 Muscle Clean
3 Clean Pull
3 Hang Power Clean
10 Front Squat

strength.name: Power Clean
strength.description:
3x3 | * Focus on triple extension
* Fast Elbows | E2MOM 18min
BUILD 3 Sets
00:00 3 @ 50%
03:00 3 @ 60%
06:00 3 @ 70%
HOLD 3 Sets
09:00 3 @ 80%
12:00 3 @ 80%
15:00 3 @ 80%

strength.name: Front Squat
strength.description:
3x3 | * Breathe and brace at the top of each rep
* Elbows Up
* Keep knees out | E3MOM 18min
BUILD 3 Sets
00:00 5 @ 50%
03:00 5 @ 60%
06:00 3 @ 70%
HOLD 3 Sets
09:00 3 @ 80%
12:00 3 @ 80%
15:00 3 @ 80%

metcon.name: MLI 26.3 (as requested by Craig & Erik)
metcon.description:
Min 1: Max thrusters @40/30
Min 2: Max Box Overs @24/20"
Min 3: Max KettleBell Swings (Russian but above eye level not too eye level) - 24/16kg
Min 4: Rest
Min 5: Max KettleBell Swings (24/16kg)
Min 6: Max Box Overs @24/20"
Min 7: Max thrusters @40/30
Scaled - step overs thrusters @ 30/25 - 16/12kg
Rx+ - thrusters @ 45/35 KB @ 32/24
**get a chalk board

hypertrophy.reasoning: Back and arm work balances anterior chain dominance from cleans, squats, and thrusters without competing for CNS recovery.
suggested_exercises: Sled Drag (backward) 2x40m for posterior chain endurance

siri_text: Tuesday's workout. Strength: Power Clean, 3 by 3 at 80 percent. Strength: Front Squat, 3 by 3 at 80 percent. Metcon: MLI 26.3 (as requested by Craig & Erik). Workout: **get a chalk board. For hypertrophy, focus on back, biceps, rear delts.
